summary: Iteration 74: Quant Lab Incubator Testing - ALL TESTS PASS. Wave 1 (MoonDev, Phantom, Whrrari) active experiments working. Wave 2 (Marik, Argona) planned placeholders displayed. 23/23 backend tests pass. Frontend shows all 6 tabs with correct data.

backend_api_tests: test_registry_active_experiments - PASS: shadow_sniper, moondev, phantom, whrrari=active; marik, argona=planned
test_moondev_report - PASS: status=active, metrics present (total_signals_received, window_filtered_out, evaluated, would_trade)
test_moondev_evaluations - PASS: records with window field (5m/15m)
test_moondev_positions - PASS: positions with window field
test_phantom_report - PASS: status=active, metrics present (total_scans, pairs_scanned, dislocations_found, hypothetical_trades)
test_phantom_evaluations - PASS: records with yes_price, no_price, price_sum, spread_bps fields
test_whrrari_report - PASS: status=active, metrics present (total_scans, groups_found, groups_evaluated, deviations_found)
test_whrrari_evaluations - PASS: records with outcome_count, price_sum, best_edge_bps fields
test_shadow_report - PASS: existing shadow sniper still works
frontend_ui_tests: Quant Lab page loads with data-testid='quant-lab-page' - PASS
EV-Gap + Stoikov tab shows metrics, positions, evaluations - PASS
MoonDev tab shows metrics (138 signals, 72 evaluated, 12 would_trade), positions with window field - PASS
Phantom Spread tab shows metrics (3 scans, 524 pairs), sample-size warning - PASS
Whrrari LMSR tab shows metrics (2 scans, 1 group), sample-size warning - PASS
Marik Latency tab shows 'PLANNED / INACTIVE / NOT YET RUNNING' placeholder - PASS
Argona Macro tab shows 'PLANNED / INACTIVE / NOT YET RUNNING' placeholder - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: shadow_moondev.py: Clean implementation with ALLOWED_WINDOWS gate for 5m/15m only
shadow_phantom.py: Proper YES+NO pricing dislocation detection with spread_bps calculation
shadow_whrrari.py: LMSR-inspired fair-value model with softmax probability distribution
server.py: All experiment endpoints properly wired (/api/experiments/{id}/report|evaluations|positions|closed)
QuantLab.jsx: Tab-based UI with proper data-testid attributes for testing
All shadow engines are 100% in-memory (no MongoDB persistence for shadow positions) - as designed
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live shadow engine data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 74 validated the Quant Lab incubator feature. Key findings: (1) All 6 experiments appear in registry with correct status (4 active, 2 planned), (2) MoonDev short-window shadow receives signals from crypto_sniper and filters to 5m/15m only (138 signals -> 72 evaluated -> 12 would_trade), (3) Phantom Spread scans binary pairs for YES+NO pricing dislocations (524 pairs scanned, 0 dislocations found yet), (4) Whrrari LMSR evaluates multi-outcome markets with fair-value model (1 group found, 0 deviations yet), (5) Wave 2 experiments (Marik, Argona) show planned placeholder UI with prerequisites, (6) Existing shadow sniper (EV-Gap + Stoikov) continues working with 46 evaluations and 3 positions, (7) All shadow engines are in-memory only - no MongoDB persistence for shadow positions.
